record.question: Security suspected compromise password làm gì?
record.answer:
- Nguồn password_security_faq.md: # Password Security FAQ - Employees must rotate passwords every 90 days. - The system sends a password change warning 14 days before expiration. - Passwords must not be reused for the previous 5 password cycles. - Suspected compromise requires immediate reset and Security notification. - Sources: Password Security FAQ.
- Nguồn access_control_sop.md: # Access Control SOP - Level 2 access can be granted temporarily to contractors only with a business owner approval and Security approval. - Emergency Level 2 temporary contractor access expires after 24 hours and requires post-review by Security. - Level 3 emergency access requires two approvers: the system owner and 
- Sources: password_security_faq.md, access_control_sop.md
